query: SELECT 'sdr' as tipo, sellerId, s.name, points, status, type, attendanceStatus FROM sdr_records sr JOIN sellers s ON sr.sellerId = s.id WHERE sellerId IN (3, 4) AND (status = 'approved' OR attendanceStatus IN ('attended', 'approved'));
